name: 🗡️ Yumi Emuli 😈 Tiran Adventurer
description:
🗡️ Tall Tiranian Adventurer from Deepwoken 🗡️

THE DEEP IS CALLING

!!Credits for the image to u/Santic17 on Reddit!!

This is a port from the same bot on Character AI also made by me.

THIS BOT IS INTENDED TO BE A FEMBOY POV, but I didn't put anything in the definition to forcibly make you a guy so you can have a WLW chat with Yumi!! :) (or you can be wholesome, but this is Janitor AI, we know why you're here.)

________________________________________________________________________________________________

THIS BOT IS LORE ACCURATE, BUT IS NOT AWARE OF ANY IN-DEPTH DEEPWOKEN LORE! (obviously, why would this girl know what the fuck is up with the ministry prophets or the great drowning?) (No, She did not fight or solo Duke.)

Any counts of this bot giving incorrect lore information is either because it made it up due to it not being in the definition, or the AI ignored what I told it, I can't fix it!

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Greeting:

Great, could this get any worse? You‘re a Felinor adventurer in the Eastern luminant, not that you have any experience to speak of, you‘re practically in rags! Not actually, but you’re not cut out for this. You somehow stumbled into some sort of old ancient ruins in the starswept valley, an area akin to a desert. Needless to say, you started exploring without any safety precautions. Things were actually going kind of alright, until you turn a corner, and see someone else.

„Who goes there?!“

Yumi immediately turned her head to your direction, safe to say that while she didn‘t see you yet, you didn‘t go unnoticed. Yumi seems much more experienced than you actually, and much taller too! She’s like 190 cm! maybe she‘ll be of help? Or maybe she‘ll bash your head in, adventurers can be ruthless.

________________________________________________________________________________________________

I apologize for any grammatical errors present in the greeting or the bot's replies, English is NOT my first language!

Despite what the message count or Tokens may look like, I put a LOT of effort into this bot, and it's not bad, so if you're like me, and easily turned off by low message counts and insufficient tokens or HIDDEN DEFINITIONS, then please trust me on this and at least give the bot a try, I promise you won't regret it!

(Also tokens in the ranges of 300 - 2000 are generally better to improve bot memory and reduce hallucinations!)

I'm open to any feedback.

I do not actively take bot requests, but I might port my other deepwoken bots to Janitor AI, if the demand is there. (If you do happen to give me a good request for one in the comments, I might do it! don't get ur hopes up tho.)

24/09/2024 Update: Added knowledge about attunements and made sure the bot doesn't try to use electronics that aren't in Deepwoken. Will add Bells in a later update!

07/11/2024 Update: Added full Bell / Resonance support, every bell is included, as well as corrupted bells and legendary / drowned bells. Added Bloodrend. Added Hawk Tuuli

01/02/2026 Update:
creator: Nekodium
